SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

Class ReliefLoadContribution

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure.ReliefLoadContribution
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class ReliefLoadContribution extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable description of one relief load contributing to a shared disposal (flare or vent) network.

Each contribution captures the governing relief load of a single protected item together with a flag indicating whether that load is concurrent with the other contributions in the network (for example, all items exposed to the same fire zone relieve simultaneously per API STD 521 section 5.3).

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • ReliefLoadContribution

      public ReliefLoadContribution(String itemName, ReliefCause cause, ReliefPhase phase, double massFlowKgPerS, boolean simultaneous)
      Creates a relief load contribution.
      Parameters:
      itemName - the protected-item name; not null
      cause - the governing relief cause; not null
      phase - the relief phase; not null
      massFlowKgPerS - the governing relief mass flow [kg/s]
      simultaneous - true if this load is concurrent with the other network contributions

      public boolean isSimultaneous()
      Returns whether this load is concurrent with the other network contributions.
